news.title: Oil Surges As Trump Asserts Control Over Strait Of Hormuz; What Happens Now
news.summary: Oil prices surged on Monday as President Donald Trump said the U.S. will reimpose a blockade on Iranian ports on Tuesday and provide other countries safe passage —for a fee — through the Strait of Hormuz.  The announcement follows an escalation of U.S.-Iran military strikes after Tehran had targeted ships in the Strait traveling an alternative path to the Tehran-approved route open for ships paying a fee to the regime.  With U.S.-Iran negotiations at an impasse over control of the key global shipping route and Tehran's nuclear program, the diplomatic route appears to be closed off, seemingly disproving Wall Street's assumption that flare-ups in fighting wouldn't lead the sides back to war.
